product_data.Features: 65-inch OLED evo panel, 4K 120Hz, Dolby Vision IQ, Dolby Atmos, webOS 23, Game Optimizer with 4x HDMI 2.1 ports, AI Picture Pro

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message:
Hello,

I hope you're doing well. I came across your listing for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV and I must say, it looks like an amazing product. I was wondering if there is any room for negotiation on the price. Thank you!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Hello! Thank you for your interest in the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. It truly is an exceptional product with its stunning OLED evo panel and advanced gaming features. While the retail price is $1,799, I'm open to discussing a fair price. What offer did you have in mind?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate your flexibility. Given my budget constraints, would you be willing to sell the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV for $800?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I appreciate your offer, but $800 is significantly below what I can accept for a brand new LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. This model offers incredible features like the OLED evo panel, 4K 120Hz, and advanced gaming capabilities, making it a premium viewing experience. I'm confident we can find a more suitable price point for such a high-end television. What's the best you can do?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I understand the value of the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. Considering its features, would you be willing to meet halfway at $900? This would allow me to stay within my budget while still investing in this top-of-the-line product.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I appreciate you meeting me halfway, but $900 is still considerably lower than I can go for this premium LG C3 OLED. It's truly a flagship TV with cutting-edge technology. I'm looking for an offer closer to the $1,500 mark. What's the highest you're able to offer to take this exceptional TV home today?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I completely understand the value of the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV and your position. However, my budget restricts me from going above $880. Unfortunately, I won't be able to proceed with the purchase if we can't agree on a price within that range.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I understand your budget constraints, and I appreciate your honesty. However, $880 is unfortunately too low for me to accept for a new LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. Given its advanced features and premium performance, my absolute minimum is significantly higher. I'm unable to go below $1,100 for this model. Would you be able to adjust your offer to meet that?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for considering my budget. I truly appreciate your offer, but unfortunately, $1,100 exceeds my maximum limit. I must stick to my budget of $880 to make this purchase. Thank you for your time and understanding.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I understand, and I appreciate your candidness. While I genuinely want to make this work, I cannot sell the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV for $880. My minimum price for this premium model remains $1,100. It seems we're unable to meet on price at this time. Thank you for your interest and your time.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for your understanding. I appreciate your time and the opportunity to discuss the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. If there are any future promotions or changes in pricing, I would be interested in revisiting the possibility of purchasing the TV. Thank you again.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Thank you for your understanding and interest. The LG C3 truly offers an exceptional viewing experience. My offer of $1,100 for this premium model stands. Please feel free to reach out if your circumstances change. Have a great day!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for your offer and understanding. I will keep your offer in mind and reach out if there are any changes on my end. Have a wonderful day as well!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: You're very welcome. I look forward to hearing from you should you decide to proceed with the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV at $1,100. Have a wonderful day!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you! Have a great day too!
